roa.docketEntryComment: TS WHET PROB SHD REM REV AP
TS WHET PROB SHD REM REV AP
CAN INT SW-WONG/D;AJW/ISS;PROB3Y/PJ190D/CTS190D/WS/VF1/SA2;FROM VICTIMREST TO OP CAROL JOHNSON AMT $1,348REST TO LAMBERT LEE,CAROL JOHNSON,KAREN MCENTIRE&DAVID WEISS AMT TBD APD
DEFT MO W/D NG PLEA GRTD;ADV/WVD CONSTL RTS;PLD G CT3-10851(A)VC/FCRT MKES FNDGS/ACCEPTS PLEA;REF APD/PSR;CONT 3/22/94 9AM S26 FOR SENTDA MO DISM REM CTS GRTD 1385PC & ALLEGS STRKN;DEFT MO FOR OR DEN
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//     /DEFT ARR/TN1/CONT 2/4/94 1030AM FOR PTC AND 2/28/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22/PC:940204/1030/S22/TR:940228/0930/S22
/MTR-APD/REVSA 02-28-98//REIN ORIG TC/ADDL CTS 32//PROB EXT 08-21-1999/
CONT'D TS WHET PROB SHD REM REV APD/SUPP:07-30-98/SHER//H1:980730/0900/S22
/MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION-APD - GRANTED /FTA/BWI/NB/OC/
PLEASE SEE 3/1/94 UPDATE
TRANSF TO D26 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM ON 3/2/94
CONT TO 3/1/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
CAN INT SW-GRANT/E;DEEMED PRETRIED
CAN INT SW-LAM/T;CONT 2/23/93 AT 9AM IN S23 FOR FUR PTC
CONT 2/15/94 AT 9AM IN S23 FOR FUR PTC
TRANSF TO D23 FOR PTC F/W
CAN  INT SW-A/LO;PD APPTD;FAW;PLEA NG;DEN ALLEGS
HTA, BAIL SET AT ORCT
MARY LIN, CANTONESE INTRP
BW PERM STAYED
BAIL SET $30,000
